Off Calendar Feb-22-2012 Continued To May-08-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Karen Mitchell and John Boessenecker for Theresa Taylor and Ann Graighead. William Webb and Seth Schwartz for Nicholas Sindicich.

The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to May 8, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of discovery and setting of the will contest. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner by March 13, 2012 if they want to participate in mediation. The Petition for Instrcutions (850 Petition) on calendar for March 28, 2012 is also continued to May 8, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy F. Andrade.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-17-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Roeser for Petitioner.

The Court granted the Ex Parte Application to dispense with notice to Katherine Sindicich as to this petition only. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order). Bond in the amount of $387,000.00 is required. Court will need finding the Katherine Sindicich is dead prior to final distribution to her children.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Whitehead.
